function.name: create_file
function.description: Create a new file (legacy - prefer write_to_file for new content).

path.description: Path to the file to create

content.description: Content to write to the file

commonErrors.solution: File already exists at that location
commonErrors.suggestedAction: Use str_replace to modify or delete existing file first

commonErrors.solution: No write permission in target directory
commonErrors.suggestedAction: Check directory permissions or select different location
Create parent directories first using bash
